ingredients: 1 large raw (unripe) mango, peeled and cut into 1-inch cubes
3 tbsp vegetable oil or extra-virgin olive oil
½ tsp asafoetida ("Heengh" in Hindi, "Perungayum" in Tamil)
2–3 green chiles (add more if you want it spicier)
1 tsp lime juice (if mango is not sour enough)
procedure: Heat the oil in a frying pan.
Add mustard seeds, asafoetida, green chillies, and red chillies. Wait until the mustard seeds splutter, then remove pan from stove.
Grind the above mixture with mango, lime juice (if needed), turmeric, and salt
